mapper.select: select fc.cont_no , fc.facility_no , fc.partner_no , p.partner_nm , p.biz_ty_nm , p.pic_nm , p.pic_telno , fc.cont_nm , fc.bid_ty_cd , bid_ty.code_name as bid_ty_nm , fc.cont_dt , fc.cont_stts_cd , cont_stts.code_name as cont_stts_nm , fc.cont_amt , fc.pymt_dt , fc.cont_bgng_dt , fc.cont_end_dt , fc.cont_ty_cd , cont_ty.code_name as cont_ty_nm , fc.cont_target_cd , fc.cont_cn , fc.rmrk_cn , fc.reg_dt , fc.mdf_dt , fc.file_group_no from facility_contract fc inner join partner p on fc.partner_no = p.partner_no inner join mgmt_office mo on p.apt_cmplex_no = mo.apt_cmplex_no left join common_code cont_ty on cont_ty.group_code_no = 'CONT_TY' and cont_ty.code_no_cd = fc.cont_ty_cd left join common_code bid_ty on bid_ty.group_code_no = 'BID_TY' and bid_ty.code_no_cd = fc.bid_ty_cd left join common_code cont_stts on cont_stts.group_code_no = 'CONTRACT_STTS' and cont_stts.code_no_cd = fc.cont_stts_cd where mo.mgmt_ofc_no = #{mgmtOfcNo} and fc.cont_no = #{contNo}

select fct.cont_no , fct.facility_no , fct.reg_dt , f.facility_nm , f.facility_ty_cd , cc.code_name as facility_ty_nm , f.loc_cn from facility_contract_target fct inner join facility f on fct.facility_no = f.facility_no left join common_code cc on cc.group_code_no = 'FACILITY_TY' and cc.code_no_cd = f.facility_ty_cd where fct.cont_no = #{contNo} order by f.facility_nm
select facility_no from facility_contract_target where cont_no = #{contNo} order by facility_no

select file_group_no as "fileGroupNo" , file_save_uuid as "fileSaveUuid" , file_og_name as "fileOgName" , file_path as "filePath" , file_ext as "fileExt" , file_size as "fileSize" , mime_type as "mimeType" , google_id as "googleId" , reg_dt as "regDt" from attach_file where file_group_no = #{fileGroupNo} order by nvl(file_sort_order, 999), reg_dt

select cc.code_no_cd as "code" , cc.code_name as "codeNm" , cc.code_content as "codeContent" from common_code cc where trim(cc.group_code_no) = 'CONT_TY' and nvl(cc.use_yn, 'Y') = 'Y' order by cc.sort_order, cc.code_no_cd

select fc.cont_no as "contNo" , fc.cont_nm as "contNm" , p.partner_nm as "partnerNm" , to_char(fc.cont_bgng_dt, 'YYYY-MM-DD') as "contBgngDt" , to_char(fc.cont_end_dt, 'YYYY-MM-DD') as "contEndDt" from facility_contract fc inner join partner p on p.partner_no = fc.partner_no inner join mgmt_office mo on mo.apt_cmplex_no = p.apt_cmplex_no where mo.mgmt_ofc_no = #{mgmtOfcNo} and fc.cont_ty_cd = 'INSTALL' and fc.cont_stts_cd = 'ACTIVE' and not exists ( select 1 from facility_contract_target fct where fct.cont_no = fc.cont_no ) and fc.facility_no is null order by to_number(regexp_substr(fc.cont_no, '[0-9]+')) desc, fc.cont_no desc

select p.partner_no as "partnerNo" , p.partner_nm as "partnerNm" , p.biz_ty_nm as "bizTyNm" , p.pic_nm as "picNm" , p.pic_telno as "picTelno" from partner p inner join mgmt_office mo on p.apt_cmplex_no = mo.apt_cmplex_no where mo.mgmt_ofc_no = #{mgmtOfcNo} and p.use_yn = 'Y' order by p.partner_nm

select f.facility_no as "facilityNo" , f.facility_nm as "facilityNm" , f.facility_ty_cd as "facilityTyCd" , cc.code_name as "facilityTyNm" , f.dong_no as "dongNo" , f.loc_cn as "locCn" , case when f.dong_no is null then '공용' when instr(f.dong_no, '_') > 0 then substr(f.dong_no, instr(f.dong_no, '_') + 1) || '동' else f.dong_no || '동' end as "dongDisplay" , case when f.dong_no is null then '공용 · ' || nvl(f.loc_cn, '상세 위치 미등록') when instr(f.dong_no, '_') > 0 then substr(f.dong_no, instr(f.dong_no, '_') + 1) || '동 · ' || nvl(f.loc_cn, '상세 위치 미등록') else f.dong_no || '동 · ' || nvl(f.loc_cn, '상세 위치 미등록') end as "facilityLocationText" from facility f inner join mgmt_office mo on f.apt_cmplex_no = mo.apt_cmplex_no left join common_code cc on cc.group_code_no = 'FACILITY_TY' and cc.code_no_cd = f.facility_ty_cd where mo.mgmt_ofc_no = #{mgmtOfcNo} and f.use_yn = 'Y' and f.facility_no not like 'MTR%' order by case when f.dong_no is null then 0 else 1 end , case when f.dong_no is null then 0 when instr(f.dong_no, '_') > 0 then to_number(substr(f.dong_no, instr(f.dong_no, '_') + 1)) else 9999 end , f.facility_nm

select utility_provider_no as utility_provider_no , csv_idntf_key as csv_idntf_key , ext_cust_no as ext_cust_no , rmrk_cn as utility_rmrk_cn , meter_ty_cd as meter_ty_cd , case meter_ty_cd when 'ELEC' then '전기' when 'GAS' then '가스' when 'WATER' then '수도' when 'HEAT' then '난방' else meter_ty_cd end as meter_ty_nm from ( select utility_provider_no , csv_idntf_key , ext_cust_no , rmrk_cn , meter_ty_cd from utility_provider where cont_no = #{contNo} and meter_ty_cd is not null order by case meter_ty_cd when 'ELEC' then 1 when 'GAS' then 2 when 'WATER' then 3 when 'HEAT' then 4 else 9 end ) where rownum = 1

select utility_provider_no as utility_provider_no , csv_idntf_key as csv_idntf_key , ext_cust_no as ext_cust_no , rmrk_cn as utility_rmrk_cn , meter_ty_cd as meter_ty_cd , case meter_ty_cd when 'ELEC' then '전기' when 'GAS' then '가스' when 'WATER' then '수도' when 'HEAT' then '난방' else meter_ty_cd end as meter_ty_nm from utility_provider where cont_no = #{contNo} order by case when meter_ty_cd is null then 2 else 1 end , case meter_ty_cd when 'ELEC' then 1 when 'GAS' then 2 when 'WATER' then 3 when 'HEAT' then 4 else 9 end , utility_provider_no
